viu30h: ofcourse in a handicap game white has to play a bit more aggressive to be able to compete with bs early advantage
viu30h: i will just take a corner for now
C[viu30h: so here white mostly thinks about one area right now
viu30h: the top left is a 3-4 an unfinished corner stone
viu30h: and white has one in the bottom right
viu30h: white cant just finish his corner because that would be too passive  white has to be active to keep presence on the board
viu30h: so i think imo white has to approach the corner
viu30h: there are 4 ways to approach
viu30h: or i should say more common ways
viu30h: of these A and B are the most common
Notbiased: did you want me to say something?
viu30h: im talking to you too
viu30h: you can say anything you want
viu30h: its like were in a go club
viu30h: here are more people to attract though
viu30h: a villain always strives for the masses
viu30h: after that we will see
Notbiased: we have one extra player here -.-
viu30h: this game goes of for some time
viu30h: some players will stop by and read a bit
Notbiased: pssh...I plan yo crush you in 10 moves
viu30h: A and B also are the 2 choices who put the most pressure on bs stone since they are closer
C[viu30h: i chose A because its more oriented on creating territory
viu30h: i couldve played B and it would have been totally fine
viu30h: its on the 3rd line so it has easier time making a base and making territory it has more troubles running away or developing though since naturally it is farther away from stuff
viu30h: bias you haveant said a single word lol
Notbiased: I've said I was going to crush you....
viu30h: b had many choices there
viu30h: 3 ways of thinking come in mind
viu30h: 1 way, the way that b chose is to add a move to the corner strengthening it
viu30h: this means bs interests lie in the left side
viu30h: b also could have played a pincer on the top someting like h17
viu30h: also b couldve just played away to approach whites corner
Notbiased: A note I can add, D15 is not applying all to much pressure to whites stone at E17
Notbiased: so playing near C10 is common to stop blacks extension
viu30h: white has many possibilites here aswell yeah
viu30h: one would be to try and stop bs plan and play on the left
viu30h: but its difficult because its the area b is strongest right now
viu30h: white could also chose to reinforce his already played stone at the top
Notbiased: as is the fate of all white options black is just really strong....
viu30h: or just approach bs upper right corner
viu30h: i think either way would be fine
viu30h: so b is strong at the left so i certainly have to think about that
viu30h: but i dont know what i wanna do about that left yet
C[viu30h: i approach here first since i wanna know what b is expecting in this top right area
viu30h: after i know that i will make my choice on how to approach the left rea of blacks
viu30h: which means hes become strong with his corner
viu30h: automatically that means the top area has grown less interesting
viu30h: since p17 is a low stone b is hard to develop in that area
viu30h: and since bs group is already strong in that area an added move wouldnt have to do with safety
viu30h: so now that i know that
viu30h: i wont reinforce e17 which is in the unimportant area
viu30h: but rather play on the left side which is now undoubtebly the biggest area on the board
viu30h: i will have to debate wich move on the left side to play
viu30h: i might also try to deal with it indirectly with a move like f3 for example   going from the outside
viu30h: i could approach bs corner at c6
viu30h: but bs choice would be easy then b naturally would pincer wich woud be an extension from bs stones from the top (which are in a high position and so its easy to develop from it)
Notbiased: that would undoubted be pincered
viu30h: i could play a splitting move on the side like c10 c9 and give b the choice on where to extend
viu30h: or i could play closer to c16 group to keep atleast a bit pressure on it
viu30h: because this is a handicap game and i wanna fool around a bit
viu30h: im gonna keep as much pressure on c14 as possible
viu30h: c10 against c7 is already a good exchange for white
viu30h: white is better of on the left side through that
viu30h: so white can consider playing at the top now
viu30h: instead of reinforcing the group on the left
C[viu30h: though i can reinforce the group on the left while putting pressure on bs group
viu30h: its hard for b to actually kill of those 2 stones 100%
C[viu30h: this move doesnt put too much pressure on myself
viu30h: so im tempted to just protect my group on the top side
C[viu30h: now that my group on q14 is stronger bs group in the middle has gotten weaker
C[viu30h: maybe i should peep and cut here
viu30h: but i dont know maybe just jumping is the safer choice here
viu30h: then later the peep and cut is severe
viu30h: and if b wants to take the one stone...
viu30h: well b would be stupid
C[viu30h: k3 was basically sente  b cant end in gote here i feel since if i get to c3 and take the corner  the k3 stone makes the wall b gains pretty much useless
viu30h: i dont worry bout n16s status too much since i already got so much in exchange
viu30h: since if i drop down i hurt my 2 stones on the left
viu30h: it feels sort of too aggressive though since i can still attack on p12 and if b fights i can fight too
viu30h: and b has to worry about the whole r9 group too if we fight so i dont know
viu30h: but outside moves first before living
viu30h: but which one of those? there are quite some
viu30h: but i sure as hell dont wanna p12 directly
viu30h: that would be too passive i think
viu30h: maybe m14 will enable me to hane at m17
viu30h: since i dont wanan drop down there really
C[viu30h: if b connects im out and that means b is still not fine yet and has quite some awkard stuff with his shape
viu30h: and b still needs to e3
C[viu30h: im tempted to just poke at o10 and then cut him
viu30h: im also tempted to just play away
viu30h: though its probably honest to make better shape first
viu30h: lets be calm and make some shape first  b ows us a move at e3 still anyway
viu30h: we can just cut if b doesnt defend after we made shape
C[viu30h: if b wants to capture the 3 stones he can have at it  in the meanwhile ill do actual important stuff on the board
viu30h: right now i treat the 2 stones and 3-3 miai (one or the other) i guess
C[viu30h: so here is the point where i think to myself
viu30h: do i really need to respond to this?
viu30h: since i have 2 wayes of getting out and dont care for the 3 stones
viu30h: i say we let him tell us if we really should answer in this position
C[viu30h: though we wont be able to attack p10 group in this game anymore
viu30h: but if b doesnt take e3
viu30h: the top right is the only territory he has
viu30h: and those d15 stones look quite wonky now
viu30h: b cant let me come up i think
viu30h: maybe i can get d16 to work somehow
viu30h: thats a bit too dreamy though i guess
C[viu30h: so i think were fine here
C[viu30h: he can play s12 though to take away points
viu30h: i want to cut at n11 but i feel like i cant now
viu30h: looks a bit too dangerous
viu30h: i guess i should just live here
viu30h: b isnt going to protect hat
C[viu30h: i guess im insane for even thinking bout that cut lol
viu30h: sometimes i dont have enough respect for bias
viu30h: b might have a nice wall on the outside now
viu30h: but i have solid groups all over the place
viu30h: so it wont be too useful
viu30h: and bs only source of territory is now undercut
viu30h: b has to e3 now i feel
viu30h: do i just take the wall and try to cut at n11 then?
viu30h: you know what lets give moyo a chance here
C[viu30h: and invade so this becomes an interesting game again
viu30h: to all of you at home
viu30h: since im making him stronger towards my weak stone at k3
C[viu30h: b absolutely must end in sente here
C[viu30h: playing d2 now would be totally insane
viu30h: im not willing to help him THAT much
C[viu30h: since we have d2 still around
viu30h: i dont mind giving up k3 and reduce all of the influence
C[viu30h: well now that n11 cut started to look juicy
C[viu30h: first reduce the area then sacrifice the stone
C[viu30h: oh wow he didnt respond?
C[viu30h: so b do you want your whole wall to come under attack?
C[viu30h: maybe i shouldve jumped one farther to be more light though
viu30h: this way he can cap
viu30h: and thats not nice xD
